name: Humble Independent School District
districtFact: Humble ISD publishes printable academic calendar PDFs with first day of school, nine-week grading periods, student/teacher breaks, Thanksgiving Holiday, Winter Break, Spring Break, inclement weather days, early release dates, staff workdays, and SECHS early release notes.

about.title: About Humble ISD
about.content: Humble Independent School District serves students in northeast Harris County, including Humble, Atascocita, Kingwood, and surrounding Houston-area communities. The district calendar helps families track the first day of school, grading periods, major breaks, staff workdays, early release dates, and the last day of school.

about.title: How to Use This Humble ISD Calendar
about.content: Use this page for districtwide school-year planning. Families should still confirm campus-specific events, testing, graduation details, bad-weather make-up decisions, and Summer Creek Early College High School schedule notes through Humble ISD and their assigned school.

planningTips.title: Planning Tips for Humble ISD Families
content: Review February carefully because Humble ISD identifies inclement weather days that may become school days if time is lost to bad weather.
Track early release dates separately because middle school, high school, all-school, and SECHS early release schedules can differ.
Use the official printable calendar page before booking travel around Student/Teacher Break, Thanksgiving Holiday, Winter Break, and Spring Break.
Confirm campus communications for parent-teacher conference dates and elementary-only no-school dates.

compareIntro: Compare the Humble ISD calendar with nearby Houston-area district calendars currently available on MySchoolDates. Dates shown include the first day, last day, and spring break.

districtFaqs.q: Which Humble ISD calendar does this page summarize?
districtFaqs.a: This page summarizes the Humble ISD district academic calendar for the listed school years.

districtFaqs.q: Can Humble ISD inclement weather days become school days?
districtFaqs.a: Yes. Humble ISD notes that listed inclement weather days may become school days if time is lost to bad weather.

districtFaqs.q: Where should families verify Humble ISD calendar updates?
districtFaqs.a: Use the official Humble ISD academic calendar page and school announcements for final confirmation. MySchoolDates is an independent reference and is not affiliated with Humble ISD.
